events.name: Rabindra Jayanti 2026
events.description: A cultural evening celebrating the life and works of Rabindranath Tagore through recitation, music, dance performances, and student-led discussions.

events.name: Poetry & Open Mic Night
events.description: Students gathered to share original poetry, short stories, and spoken-word performances in a warm literary atmosphere.

events.name: Annual Literary Fest
events.description: A day-long festival featuring book exhibitions, literary quizzes, panel discussions, creative writing competitions, and cultural performances.
